pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam hub for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between our WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this data and tell me what might be happening?

Part # | WMS Count | Physical Count | Delta
A-102 (Capacitors) | 1450 | 1442 | -8
B-550 (Resistors) | 3200 | 3195 | -5
C-009 (IC Chips) | 500 | 497 | -3
D-882 (LEDs) | 1200 | 1190 | -10

The deltas are small but they're happening every week. What could be causing this?
